name: Honey Glazed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds cut-up broiler fryer chicken, skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat coals or gas grill.
2. Mix all ingredients except chicken in a bowl.
3. Place the chicken on the grill, bone side down, and cook for 5-6 minutes over medium heat.
4. Turn the chicken occasionally.
5. Cover and continue grilling the chicken for an additional 20-40 minutes, turning it and brushing with the honey mixture 2 or 3 times until the juices are no longer pink in the thickest parts.
6. Discard any remaining honey mixture.
7. Serve 6 servings.
